reviews.review_msg: it's amazing how something you can be really interested in can be made so boring. heather is not an engaging speaker, but really knows what she's talking about. too bad she can't convey that information to her sleeping students.

Year isn't finished yet but this is sort of ridiculous. I was really excited to learn, and incredibly disappointed to find out that we were teaching ourselves. It's either an absent prof missing a full month of lectures or having us do one and a half hour presentations to teach ourselves everytime. The assignments are also insanely unclear.
super nice person, not a great prof. everything was extremely disorganized and little to no explanation for anything was given. easier class for sure but be prepared to be confused
amazing energy and enthusiasm, even for boring topics.  excellent prof, should be given tenure!

The worst prof EVER! Boring, fails to get the point across in a concise manner.  She reads from a script but often gets lost stuttering. Lecture notes are hard to understand and there is no punctuation or anything. Horrible in every aspect.
